title: Week 06 - Quantity Relations and Double Enumeration
description: Practice searching possible pairs with two variables.

questions.title: Count Ways to Buy Two Types of Candy

description.statement: Count how many non-negative pairs a and b satisfy a + b = total.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(total)
    local count = 0
    for a = 0, total do
        local b = total - a
        if b >= 0 then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end
